Use reall abbr element
documentation says it takes two parameters, unmaking to help editors fill it in and detect errors. Using {{#tag:nowiki}} to allow " character.
: [[id:Templat:Abbr]]
add font parameters
revision.text:
<abbr title="{{#tag:nowiki|{{{2|}}}}}">{{#switch: {{{3|}}}
    | u | unicode | Unicode = {{ unicode |{{{1|}}}}}
    | i | IPA = {{ IPA |{{{1|}}}}}
    | {{{1|}}} }}</abbr><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
